user_request: What are all the lunch places

rest_001.poi_name: Picnic Lunch from Sud Forno at Trinity Bellwoods Park
rest_001.description: Pick up fresh Italian sandwiches and pastries from Sud Forno on Queen Street, then enjoy a relaxing picnic under the trees in Trinity Bellwoods Park.
rest_001.notable_highlights: Fresh bakery items, open green space, lively park atmosphere

rest_003.description: Grab a stylish brasserie-style lunch directly across from the Royal Ontario Museum, offering elevated comfort dishes and a great view of Bloor Street.
rest_003.notable_highlights: Classic burgers and brasserie plates, patio seating with ROM views, excellent cocktails

rest_006.poi_name: Lunch at Toronto Island BBQ & Beer Co.
rest_006.description: Enjoy a relaxed lakeside lunch right on Toronto Island with fresh BBQ plates and unbeatable skyline views.
rest_006.notable_highlights: Outdoor waterfront dining, Toronto skyline views, casual island atmosphere
